findings.description: Source file contains 4 h2 headings (ファイルのダウンロード方法, BLOB型カラムのダウンロード方法, データレコードのダウンロード方法, 別ウィンドウを開きダウンロードを開始したい場合) but knowledge file has only 1 section (s1). All content is merged into a single large section. Automated check S9 also flagged this (reported 3 headings; actual count is 4).
findings.source_evidence: Four distinct == h2 sections in the RST source file

findings.location: sections.s1 — 別ウィンドウを開きダウンロードを開始したい場合
findings.description: The source includes an explicit implementation tip for hiding the download button using CSS (`style="display: none;"`). This guidance is absent from the knowledge file's sub-window JSP example.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「ダウンロードボタンを表示したくない場合は、「style="display: none;"」などCSSを使用する。」 (comment in the sub-window JSP code block)

findings.description: PascalCase class names `SqlRow` and `SqlResultSet` appear in the BLOB and data-record action code examples but are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source action code: `SqlRow record = getRecord(request);` and `SqlResultSet records = getRecords(request);`
